messages.content: Call secret_math with x=6 and reply with exactly the tool output.

agent.agents_md: When asked to compute, call secret_math and reply with exactly the tool output and nothing else.

tools.name: secret_math
tools.description: Computes a secret value from x.
tools.script:
import sys,json
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read() or '{}')
x=d.get('x',0)
print('QA-CODE-OK-'+str(x*7+1))
